codeReview.summary: Clean structural refactoring that extracts 11 functions from kfx.go (9) and render.go (2) into the new yj_to_epub.go file, aligning with the Python yj_to_epub.py module. All moved functions are copied verbatim — no logic changes, no renaming, no reformatting. Unused imports (image/jpeg, log, path/filepath, strings from kfx.go; fmt, os from render.go) were correctly cleaned up. All verification steps pass: build, vet, tests.

summary: The worker correctly implemented the feature by creating yj_to_epub.go with all 11 specified functions moved from kfx.go and render.go. The refactoring is a pure code move — no logic changes. kfx.go correctly retains all entry points (Classify, ConvertFile, ConvertFileWithTrace), error types (DRMError, UnsupportedError), data types (decodedBook, renderedSection, all fragment structs, navTarget, navPoint, guideEntry, pageEntry, rawBlob, contSignature, drmionSignature), and the signatures match the feature spec exactly. render.go correctly retains all anchor resolution functions (registerNamedPositionAnchor, resolveRenderedAnchorURIs, etc.), DOM cleanup functions (cleanupRenderedSections, cleanupHTMLParts, etc.), materializeRenderedSections, renderedSectionBodyHTML, replaceSectionDOMClassTokens, and replaceHTMLClassTokens. Import cleanup was done correctly — only truly unused imports were removed from source files. Build, vet, and tests all pass. The worker followed the go-refactor-worker skill procedure faithfully.
